title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Province of Laguna for the Community Development Program Financial Assistance to Local Government Unit LGU) Covering 1st to 4th Quarter of Cy 2023 in the Total Amount of One Million Pesos (P 1,000,000.00) to Be Utilized Not Later Than December 2023. Councilor Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap 02/06/2023
